ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location or city */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of user account (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie (e.g., Action, Comedy) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary or synopsis of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the movie */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the movie is made */,
  "age_rating" TEXT /* Age rating (e.g., PG, R) */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's poster */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID for the movie */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the movie is marked as deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating score given by the user (e.g., 1 to 10) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rating was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating was submitted anonymously */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., overall, acting, direction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_ratings" (
  "monthly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly rating entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie rated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the rating */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the rating */,
  "month_rating" INTEGER /* Count of ratings in that month */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating for the movie in that month */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews in that month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monthly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yearly_ratings" (
  "yearly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yearly rating entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie rated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the rating */,
  "year_rating" INTEGER /* Count of ratings in that year */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating for the movie in that year */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yearly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yearly_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review was submitted anonymously */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., overall, acting, direction) */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being engaged with */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the user has viewed the movie */,
  "last_viewed" TEXT /* Date when the movie was last viewed by the user */,
  "last_rating" TEXT /* Date when the user last rated the movie */,
  "last_review" TEXT /* Date when the user last wrote a review for the movie */,
  "is_favorited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the movie is a favorite of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended movie */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score of the recommendation based on user ratings and preferences */,
  "recommended_by" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., algorithm, friend) */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "admin_username" TEXT /* Username of the admin user */,
  "admin_email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "admin_password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the admin user */,
  "admin_role" TEXT /* Role of the admin user (e.g., moderator, data analyst) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the admin user's last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the admin account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin user who performed the action (if applicable) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_id")
)
